# agent-run

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Agent-run simulator on the public site's Agents page: a fake task list where the visitor launches agents and watches each race through worktree → edit → build → merge, several concurrently — a deterministic, client-only replay of the real loop.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `WebsiteAgents.Section` "Agent run demo" → `AgentRunSection`
  - Uses:
    - `apps/website/pillars/agents.WebsiteAgents`
    - `primitives/css/badge.Badge`
    - `primitives/css/bouncing-dots.BouncingDots`
    - `primitives/css/card.Card`
    - `primitives/css/selection-indicator.CheckboxIndicator`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
